'''âf-w-h-t''' ('''kafawhetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:bebury|bebury]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-w-h-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:bebury|bebury]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-w-h-t
|-
! Lemma
| kafawhetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifawhetoko|thifawhetoko]] || [[word:jifawhetoko|jifawhetoko]] || [[word:shifawhetoko|shifawhetoko]] || [[word:kifawhetoko|kifawhetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufawhetoko|thuthufawhetoko]] || [[word:jujufawhetoko|jujufawhetoko]] || [[word:shushufawhetoko|shushufawhetoko]] || [[word:kukufawhetoko|kukufawhetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofawhetoko|thofawhetoko]] || [[word:jofawhetoko|jofawhetoko]] || [[word:shofawhetoko|shofawhetoko]] || [[word:kofawhetoko|kofawhetoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafawhetoko|thafawhetoko]] || [[word:jafawhetoko|jafawhetoko]] || [[word:shafawhetoko|shafawhetoko]] || [[word:kafawhetoko|kafawhetoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
